name: SpaceVibes VR
short_description: An Artistic VR “Shooter” Game For Everyone! Enter space and enjoy shooting flying objects with a laser gun while jamming out to the SpaceVibes soundtrack! ** View long description for important details! **
detailed_description:
An Artistic VR “Shooter” Game For Everyone!
Enter space and enjoy shooting flying objects with a laser gun while jamming out to the SpaceVibes soundtrack!

Take a break, and jam out with Space Vibes!

SUPPORTS OCULUS RIFT - OCULUS QUEST WITH LINK MAY BE BLURRY DUE TO COMPRESSION!

NOTE: In certain situations you will have to use the trigger and in other situations you will have to press either A or X on the touch controllers.
Please try both if it isn't working!
